title: Aquarius Trilogy
description: Add a new aquatic dimension featuring some refreshing biomes and structures
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2250848eecc9fe2c0687a4bbe48cce986decaa1e.png)

**A NEW ADVENTURE IN AN AQUATIC DIMENSION !**

Aquarius adds a new dimensions, intending to provide different experiences in minecraft. This dimension originated on an ancient planet, where a civilization once lived, but for some reason they have disappeared, but their traces prove that the planet was once prosperous.
Aquarius（渊水）加入了一个新维度，试图为玩家提供不一样的游戏体验。这个维度起源于一个古老的行星，一个文明曾在这里生存，但是，不知什么原因他们已经消失了，但是他们遗留的痕迹证明着这个星球曾经的繁荣。

# **FEATURES**
- **A new dimension**
- **A portal for entering dimension**
- **10+ biomes**
- **Some structures**
- **Custom Items**

**More Details in my channel:[Here](https://space.bilibili.com/1201384657/?spm_id_from=333.788.upinfo.detail.click)**
# **How to use**
**Installing:**

If you are using a datapack version, you are required to get the resource pack in here:[Here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/aquarius-trilogy/)

If some functions don't work, use /reload, if it can't work after that, report the bugs here:[Here](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1LWYkzCEP5?spm_id_from=333.788.recommend_more_video.14&vd_source=4f4992186b433d9d35154029deec0149)

**How to build the portal correctly?**

It costs you 12 dark prismarine and 12 dark prismarine stairs to build the portal like this, no block in the portal frame or it will not activate:
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5420f6b061f63b2c3aff03192a3b92cee6335010.webp)
You can find the ruined portal in overworld
To activate the portal, you are require to open the chest near the ruined portal and get an item called **Aquarius Lordstone(渊水指路石)**, and right click at the top of this block:![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f53fa6d7e392258a6fb839180af0b1271cec7da.webp)
To enter the dimension, you need to stand at the middle of the portal and press shift, wait for 5s and then you'll be teleported.
# **What you play**
**The mod adds some spectacular biomes and structures:**
The Jellyfish Fungle biome:
![Jellyfish Fungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa5118a0a66bc76ca4c673b9d40769315d626ee.webp)

![Aurora Garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be6920fe403687662d38b1a500344effdd38cf22.webp)
